entry.title: PQC: Lattice-based signatures
entry.summary:
The recent clarification regarding the implementation of the hybrid scheme within Bitcoin's framework was provided by Jonas, shedding light on its applicability at the wallet level rather than at the consensus or opcode levels. This demystification helps focus development efforts correctly and avoids unnecessary confusion among developers engaged in enhancing Bitcoin's architecture. For more details on this explanation, one can refer to Jonas's thread available [here](https://x.com/isabelfoxenduke/status/2057839255049716173?s=20).
This information is crucial for developers who are subscribed to the Bitcoin Development Mailing List as it directly impacts the approach and understanding required for future enhancements and implementations within the Bitcoin ecosystem. It emphasizes the importance of clear communication channels and expert clarifications in managing complex cryptocurrency development issues effectively.
